commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Separate, different from that ver. 9., (Calmet; Hebrew gizra.; Haydock) between the temple and the priests' apartments, which it may also designate, (Calmet) unless it (Haydock) mean the temple itself, which was divided from the rest, (Menochius) and set aside for prayer (Haydock)
